description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, surrounded by a modest yard with a few trees and a small garden area. The exterior walls are finished in a light tan color, with large windows distributed along the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The layout includes several rooms, visible through the open plan and window placements, and a covered porch or patio area is attached to one side. The property features a driveway or parking space adjacent to the main structure, and the landscaping includes both grassy and paved sections. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with glass windows and some metal or wood framing. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, tan exterior, large windows, and landscaped yard featuring trees and a patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a tree in the yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage area, and additional windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, garden, and more private outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible porch, side windows, and landscaped greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
